name: Duo Stale Active Accounts (365 days)
description: Detects active Duo accounts with no login activity for at least 365 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS account_name, u.last_login_at AS last_login FROM duo_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (u.last_login_at IS NULL OR u.last_login_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Disable long-dormant accounts and require formal approval before any reactivation.
